title: BEM-688 verify hourly delta
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 05:39 (UTC+3)'
renderer=Path('scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py')
text=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore') if renderer.exists() else ''
checks=[
 {'name':'renderer_exists','pass':renderer.exists(),'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'uses_snapshot_file','pass':'curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'compares_previous_current_snapshot','pass':'previous_snapshot == current_snapshot' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'no_change_branch_exists','pass':'Изменений за отчётный час нет' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'state_records_unchanged_flag','pass':'unchanged_since_last_snapshot' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'full_table_is_conditional','pass':'if unchanged:' in text and 'else:' in text and '№ | Наименование' in text,'evidence':str(renderer)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='delta_logic_verified' if not failed else 'delta_logic_failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'HOURLY_DELTA_VERIFY_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'verify_hourly_delta_no_changes.v1','bem':'BEM-688','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem688_verify_hourly_delta_no_changes.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem688_verify_hourly_delta_no_changes.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-688 | Verify Hourly Delta No Changes | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem688_verify_hourly_delta_no_changes','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem688_verify_hourly_delta_no_changes.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-688 '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified hourly delta/no-change renderer logic statically: snapshot compare, no-change message, conditional full table, state flag')
"""
